label: Fleet Match
description: Customer has existing wrapped vehicles and design files to match
customer_message: Upload your existing design files and we'll match your fleet.

label: Print-Ready Artwork
description: Customer provides complete print-ready design files
customer_message: Upload your print-ready files (AI, PDF, EPS) and we'll handle production.

label: Logo + Vision
description: Customer has logo and brand guidelines, needs design work
customer_message: Share your logo and vision - our design team will create concepts.

label: Logo Only

customer_message: Share your logo and we'll design something that fits your brand.

label: Start from Scratch
description: Customer needs everything - logo design may be needed too
customer_message: Tell us about your business and we'll create a complete design.
